headline: The Home Depot, Inc. (HD) Launches Real-Time Delivery Tracker for Pro Customers
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 11 Best Kid-Friendly Stocks to Invest In. The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the best kid-friendly stocks on our list. TheFly reported on February 25 that UBS increased its price target for HD to $450 from $430 and maintained a Buy rating on the stock. The firm updated […]
